zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sandys於1493年出生在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德時，他的父親George Sandys28歲，母親Margaret Curwen24歲。他於大約1513年與Margaret Dixon在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年8月23日在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sandys于1493年出生在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德时，他的父亲George Sandys28岁，母亲Margaret Curwen24岁。他于大约1513年与Margaret Dixon在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年8月23日在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sandys was born in 1493, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, his father, George Sandys, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Curwen, was 24. He married Margaret Dixon about 1513, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 August 1540, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margaret Dixon environ 1513, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 août 1540, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Sandys(이)가 1493년 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Sandys(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Curwen(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1513년 영국 랭카실르에서 Margaret Dixon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 8월 23일 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 호크셰아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sandys nasceu em 1493, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Sandys, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Curwen, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Dixon aproximadamente 1513, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1540, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sandys родился в 1493 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени George Sandys было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Curwen, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Dixon около 1513 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 августа 1540 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
